creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch looks good to me (and is much cleaner!).  Weird that it works ok on 11.0.  Please commit.  You can use 'Reviewed by / Approved by: jhb'.

FYI I have some WIP patches to truss to decode more syscall args but have not yet tried to decode capabilities other than fcntl rights:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/compare/master...bsdjhb:sysdecode_more
